member.name: T:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Application.Attributes.AuthorizeAttribute
member.summary: Specifies the class this attribute is applied to requires authorization.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Application.Attributes.AuthorizeAttribute.Roles
member.summary: Gets or sets a comma delimited list of roles that are allowed to access the resource.

member.name: P:JordiAragonZaragoza.SharedKernel.Application.Attributes.AuthorizeAttribute.Policy
member.summary: Gets or sets the policy name that determines access to the resource.
